A timeless fragrance inspired by classic perfumery heritage with elegant warm notes. As the scent settles, it reveals a rich base of licorice, sandalwood, amber, patchouli, and Haitian vetiver, leaving a deep, warm, and sophisticated finish

Finally, the scent settles into a rich base of Haitian vetiver, bringing an earthy and grounding finish that lingers beautifully.

The heart unfolds into an elegant floral bouquet of rose, geranium, ylang-ylang, orris root, angelica, and jasmine, adding depth and sophistication. The scent finishes with a rich and lasting base of incense, sandalwood, woody notes, musk, patchouli, tonka bean, oakmoss, vanilla, and vetiver, leaving a warm, smooth, and luxurious trail.

Description: The fragrance opens with a vibrant blend of pink pepper, green apple, grapefruit, lemon, and yuzu, creating a fresh and energetic citrus-spicy introduction. The heart reveals an aromatic mix of violet leaf, lavender, cardamom, and ginger, adding a refined and slightly spicy character. As it dries down, the scent settles into a smooth and masculine base of Haitian vetiver, musk, sandalwood, cedarwood, and light amber, leaving a warm and sophisticated trail.

Name: Goldsa
Description: Orange, Apricot, and Muguet create a fresh and fruity opening, leading into a soft floral heart of Peony blended with warm Tonka and creamy Sandalwood. The scent finishes with a smooth and comforting base of Vanilla and Musk, leaving a sweet and elegant trail.

Name: Gentleman Socitysa
Description: The fragrance opens with an aromatic blend of cardamom and sage, creating a fresh and spicy introduction that feels both vibrant and refined. This uplifting start gradually unfolds into a rich heart where French narcissus adds a floral elegance, beautifully balanced with the earthy depth of Haitian vetiver and Madagascar vetiver.

Name: Honorsa
Description: In the dry-down, the fragrance evolves into a warm and lasting blend of musk, cedarwood, and amber. The woody notes add depth and elegance, while amber provides a gentle golden warmth. Soft musk ties everything together, leaving a smooth and sensual finish.

Name: Aventisa Limited Edition 23
Description: A bold fusion of juicy bergamot, blackcurrant and apple leads into a rich pineapple heart, all grounded by a smoky, woody base that lingers with power.

Name: Brabary Herosa
Description: My Burberry is a lush, floral-fruity perfume inspired by a London garden after rain. It opens with sweet pea, bergamot, mandarin orange, grapefruit, and lemon. The heart blends quince, freesia, geranium, peach, green notes, gardenia, and passionfruit. Base notes include damask rose, rose, patchouli, musk, leather, and violet. It’s elegant, fresh-floral, and ideal for day-wear with a touch of romantic charm.

Name: Good Girl Got Drama Siech
Short description: Inspired by :  Good Girl Got Drama
Description: The fragrance opens with indulgent notes of almond and coffee that immediately capture attention. It unfolds into a rich floral heart of tuberose and jasmine, adding a touch of elegance and strength. The base settles into a creamy gourmand blend of tonka bean, cocoa, vanilla, and sandalwood, creating a warm and unforgettable trail.

Name: 24 Platinum
Description: 24 opens with a comforting blend of sweet vanilla and gentle powdery accents that wrap you in soft warmth. At its heart, a refreshing interplay of passion fruit and fresh water brings a vibrant, invigorating spark. In the dry-down, the scent evolves into a musky and lavender-infused base—a sophisticated, subtly aromatic finish that lingers with effortless charm

Name: Jadursa
Description: The heart blooms with wild strawberry, orange blossom, and iris, creating a vibrant and multifaceted floral bouquet that feels both fresh and luxurious. As the scent evolves, it settles into a creamy base of sandalwood, vanilla, and tonka bean, adding warmth, sweetness, and lasting elegance.

Name: Insolensisa
Description: The heart blooms with wild strawberry, orange blossom, and iris, creating a vibrant and multifaceted floral bouquet that feels both fresh and luxurious. As the scent evolves, it settles into a creamy base of sandalwood, vanilla, and tonka bean, adding warmth, sweetness, and lasting elegance.

Name: Midnight Rosie Sa
Description: It opens with a fresh, juicy burst of lychee and pomelo layered over a subtle mate note, creating an inviting and luminous introduction. The heart unfolds into a romantic bouquet of red rose, lily, and iris, adding floral elegance and fullness to the composition.

Name: Gentlemansa Reserve
Description: The base unfolds with an intoxicating note of whiskey, enriched by woody accords and warm amber, delivering a sensual and long-lasting finish. Bold yet refined, this fragrance is crafted for the modern gentleman who appreciates luxury, confidence, and timeless style in every detail of his presence.

Name: Poisonsa Girl
Description: Designed for a younger generation of fans, this fragrance arrives in a pink bottle inspired by the iconic Poison silhouette. Described as a bold bitter sweet floral, it is irresistibly indulgent and playfully daring. Created for rebellious, confident young women ? modern pop feminists who chase their dreams the scent captures attitude, sweetness, and fearless self-expression in every spray.

Name: 202 Sexysa
Description: The fragrance opens with indulgent sweet toffee accords, offering a deliciously gourmand introduction. At its heart, iris and candy notes blend softness with playful sweetness. The scent settles into a smooth and comforting base of pure vanilla and musk, creating a warm, creamy, and long-lasting finish.

Name: 20s Back Sa
Description: The fragrance opens with a bold and vibrant blend of black pepper, lemon, and saffron, delivering a spicy citrus spark. At its heart, sage and Turkish rose create a refined balance of aromatic freshness and floral elegance. The composition settles into a rich and lasting base of vanilla, cypress oil, cedarwood, and patchouli, offering warmth, depth, and woody sophistication.

Name: Gentlemansa
Description: Fragrance unveils a refined composition built around a distinctive blend of black pepper, lavender, orris, patchouli, and black vanilla. The aromatic freshness of lavender and the subtle spice of black pepper meet the powdery elegance of orris, while patchouli and black vanilla add depth, warmth, and sensual sophistication.

Name: Golden Dust
Description: Rich, opulent vanilla lies at the heart of its allure, softened by smooth, comforting undertones that appeal effortlessly to both men and women. Designed for confident individuals who command attention naturally, this scent enhances your presence without ever overpowering it.

Name: Ysa Le Parfum
Description: French lavender essence blends seamlessly with the sensual richness of Moroccan orange blossom, enhanced by bold musky accords and the comforting warmth of vanilla. The result is a distinctive, long-lasting fragrance that balances freshness with deep, alluring sophistication.

Name: Ysa
Description: French lavender essence blends seamlessly with the sensual richness of Moroccan orange blossom, enhanced by bold musky accords and the comforting warmth of vanilla. The result is a distinctive, long-lasting fragrance that balances freshness with deep, alluring sophistication.

Name: Noir Extremsa
Description: The fragrance opens with a vibrant fusion of cardamom, ginger, mandarin orange, neroli, and sparkling citrus accords, creating a fresh yet subtly spicy introduction. At its heart, a creamy note of kulfi blends beautifully with Bulgarian rose, orange blossom, and jasmine, adding floral richness and smooth sweetness. The base unfolds into a warm and indulgent trail of vanilla, leather, suede, amber, tonka bean, guaiac wood, and cedar, delivering depth, sensuality, and lasting elegance.

Name: Sweet Oud 24
Description: Experience the perfect harmony of freshness and depth with Sweet Oud 24, a captivating unisex fragrance designed for those who appreciate elegance with a modern twist. This scent opens with a vibrant burst of citrus and fruity notes, gently unfolding into a rich and sensual woody base.

Name: Still Timz
Description: Inspired by Stilled Time

Name: Purple Aoudsa
Description: Purple Aoudsa by Sasan Perfumes is a bold and sophisticated fragrance crafted for those who appreciate the richness of oud. This luxurious scent delivers a deep, woody aroma enhanced with smooth and warm undertones, creating a perfectly balanced and long-lasting experience.

Name: 24 Intense
Description: 24 Intense  Perfume, our blended scents are more than just fragrances they are expressions of emotion and memory. Each scent is thoughtfully composed to capture moments, inspire feelings, and leave a distinctive, long-lasting impression. Experience a world of color, depth, and originality in every bottle.

Name: 24 Aoud
Description: The fragrance opens with rich notes of dark chocolate, mandarin orange, and fresh bergamot. At its heart, a vibrant blend of spicy and fruity accords is enhanced by elegant florals including gardenia, jasmine, and ylang-ylang. The scent settles into a deep, warm base of patchouli, oud, sandalwood, incense, and amber.

Name: Imagine
Description: This fragrance opens with a vibrant burst of citron, Calabrian bergamot, and Sicilian orange, delivering a fresh and energetic start. The heart reveals an elegant blend of Tunisian neroli, Nigerian ginger, and Ceylon cinnamon, adding a warm and spicy complexity.

Name: Snake
Short description: Inspired by The Voice Of The Snake
Description: Sasan Perfumes is a bold and captivating fragrance crafted for those who appreciate intensity and depth. Built around rich agarwood (oud), this scent is enhanced with the warm spice of saffron and the earthy richness of patchouli. The result is a powerful, long-lasting fragrance that leaves a striking and unforgettable impression.

Name: Tuscany Leathersa
Description: Inspired by : Tuscan Leather

Name: Bakhoor 9
Description: Inspired by Bukhoor No 9

Name: Bergamot Imperialsa
Description: Inspired by Bois Imperial

Name: Deep Masasa
Description: Inspired by Deep Masa’ey

Name: Dehn Oud Alshamsa
Short description: Inspired by Dahn Oudh Al Shams
Description: Dehn Oud Alshamsa by Sasan Perfumes is a rich and captivating oud oil crafted for those who appreciate depth and tradition. This luxurious fragrance delivers a warm, woody aroma with a smooth and long-lasting finish. Perfectly balanced, it reflects elegance, strength, and timeless Arabian heritage in every drop.

Name: Aoud Isfahani
Description: Inspired by Oud Ispahan

Name: Black Afgani
Description: Discover a luxury oud perfume featuring spicy green notes, warm tobacco and coffee, and a deep base of incense, amber, and vanilla. Perfect for a bold, lasting impression.

Name: Barakatsa Rouge
Description: Inspired by :  Baccarat Roug

Name: Erba Peurasa
Description: The fragrance opens with a vibrant burst of Sicilian orange, Calabrian bergamot, and Sicilian lemon, creating a bright and refreshing citrus introduction. The heart unfolds with a luscious blend of fruity accords, adding sweetness and vitality. It settles into a soft and comforting base of white musk, Madagascar vanilla, and amber, leaving a warm and elegant trail.

Name: Dehn Aloud Patchouli
Short description: Inspired by Dehn Oud Al Patchouli
Description: This classic Arabian oil combines rich oud and warm spices with smoky and woody depth, anchored by amber and musk for a bold and traditional scent.

Name: Aoud Malaysia
Description: A soft and alluring blend that combines musky warmth with a delicate powdery elegance. Subtle animalic undertones add depth and character, while a gentle touch of sweetness smooths the composition, creating a sensual and comforting fragrance experience.

Name: Dehn Aloud Comboudi
Short description: Inspired by Dehn Al Oud Comboudi
Description: This rich and earthy oud composition highlights premium quality oud as its central character, with deep woody and leather nuances and a subtle touch of sweetness.

Name: Greesa
Description: Belonging to the Floral?Woody?Musk family, this fragrance opens with the creamy smoothness of milk blended seamlessly with the soft, musky nuance of ambrette, creating a gentle and inviting introduction. The heart reveals a captivating bouquet of tuberose and jasmine, enhanced by a delicate veil of incense that adds depth and subtle intrigue. As it settles, the composition unfolds into a warm and comforting base of vanilla and musk, enriched by the velvety sweetness of tonka bean and a refined hint of cacao.

Name: Kerkesa
Description: Defined by its gentle sweetness and serene character, this fragrance evokes a sense of calm and quiet pleasure. It opens with rich, enveloping notes of amber and musk, creating warmth and depth from the first impression. At its heart, delicate Turkish roses and soft florals bloom gracefully, adding elegance and refinement. The composition rests on a smooth base of vanilla and bergamot, tenderly caressing the skin with a comforting softness. The result is a scent that enhances your presence with tranquility, balance, and focused sophistication.

Name: Lamore 4
Description: The fragrance opens with a bright and refreshing blend of lemon zest and bitter orange blossom, delivering a vibrant citrus sparkle. At its heart, aromatic spices add warmth and character. The scent settles into a smooth and lasting base of musk, amber, and woody accords, creating a refined and comforting finish.

Name: Barakatsa Rouge Parfum
Description: This captivating composition blends the richness of bitter almond and saffron with radiant jasmine and sensual musky-woody accords. The fragrance highlights a harmonious fusion of refined elements, masterfully balanced through the art of perfumery. Encased in a striking bottle adorned with a bold red aesthetic, it reflects both sophistication and timeless allure.

Name: Dehn Aloud Sioufi
Short description: Inspired by Dehn El Oud Seufi
Description: From first application through the dry-down, the scent revolves around oud (agarwood) at every stage delivering a warm, woody, and deeply resinous experience that embodies traditional Arabian perfumery. The entire pyramid relies on oud?s complex character, making Seufi ideal for lovers of pure, rich oud with a fresh-spicy nuance.

Name: Hudsa
Description: Hudsa is a premium fragrance crafted for everyday elegance and lasting impression.

Name: Hubbi #1
Description: Hubbi 1 is a premium fragrance crafted for everyday elegance and lasting impression.

Name: Happiness
Description: Happiness is a premium fragrance crafted for everyday elegance and lasting impression.

Name: Aoud Maracujsa
Description: Aoud Maracujsa is a premium fragrance crafted for everyday elegance and lasting impression.

Name: Aventisa Absolu
Description: Aventisa Absolu is a premium fragrance crafted for everyday elegance and lasting impression.

Name: Khanjarsa
Description: Khanjarsa is a premium fragrance crafted for everyday elegance and lasting impression.

Name: Alex 2
Description: Alex 2 is a premium fragrance crafted for everyday elegance and lasting impression.

Name: Arab Rose
Description: Arab Rose is a premium fragrance crafted for everyday elegance and lasting impression.

Name: King of Avintas
Description: King of Avintas is a premium fragrance crafted for everyday elegance and lasting impression.

Name: Voice of Saccarat
Description: Voice of Saccarat is a premium fragrance crafted for everyday elegance and lasting impression.

Name: Lmensitsa
Description: Lmensitsa is a premium fragrance crafted for everyday elegance and lasting impression.

Name: Leather 24
Description: Leather 24 is a premium fragrance crafted for everyday elegance and lasting impression. This luxurious leather fragrance blends rich leather, warm spices, and woody notes for a long-lasting scent. Perfect for daily wear or special occasions.

Name: Aoud Woodsa
Description: Aoud Woodsa is a premium fragrance crafted for everyday elegance and lasting impression.

Name: Novo Mosa
Description: Novo Mosa is a premium fragrance crafted for everyday elegance and lasting impression.

Name: Omber Nomasa
Description: Omber Nomasa is a premium fragrance crafted for everyday elegance and lasting impression.

Name: Emirati Misksa
Description: Emirati Misksa is a premium fragrance crafted for everyday elegance and lasting impression.This fragrance opens with a refreshing burst of vibrant top notes that instantly awaken the senses with brightness and energy. As the scent evolves, a rich and elegant heart unfolds, revealing a harmonious blend of refined aromatic accords that add depth and character.

Name: Matier Nosa
Description: Each scent is crafted to evoke a distinct mood and story, with names that emphasize emotion and experience rather than focusing solely on individual ingredients.

Name: Oragsa
Description: Oragsa is a premium fragrance crafted for everyday elegance and lasting impression. This scent opens with juicy fruitiness that instantly uplifts the senses, leading into a charming floral heart layered with soft warmth. Its smooth, comforting base gives it a lasting, feminine trail perfect for everyday wear or sunny occasions. Boss Orange captures a fresh, spirited elegance that feels effortless and fun.

Name: Vert Malashisa
Description: Vert Malashisa is a premium fragrance crafted for everyday elegance and lasting impression.It opens with a bright and slightly sharp blend of bitter orange and petitgrain, offering a fresh citrusy introduction. The heart reveals an elegant floral harmony of jasmine sambac and ylang-ylang, enhanced by a subtle touch of pink pepper. As it settles, the base unfolds into a soft and comforting blend of lily, creamy vanilla, and warm benzoin, leaving a smooth and lasting impression.

Name: Accentosa
Description: The fragrance opens with a vibrant blend of juicy pineapple and fresh hyacinth, creating a bright and sophisticated first impression. At its heart, an elegant fusion of jasmine, iris, and a subtle touch of pink pepper adds refinement and gentle spice.

Name: Elsiumsa
Description: A vibrant and sophisticated scent that opens with fresh citrus and crisp green accents, leading into a refined floral heart with jasmine, rose, and violet. Anchored by rich vetiver, patchouli, cedarwood, and musk, it delivers a bold yet elegant finish perfect for confident everyday wear or special occasions.

Name: Aziransa
Description: Beautiful harmony of freshness, softness, and warmth, crafted for those who appreciate a scent that feels both comforting and refined. It opens with a bright citrus accord blended with subtle sweet nuances, creating an inviting and uplifting first impression. The freshness at the top feels clean and vibrant, instantly energizing the senses while maintaining a smooth elegance.

Name: King Of Vanilla
Description: A perfectly balanced composition designed for everyone who appreciates elegance and warmth.

Name: Kobrasa
Description: A refined composition that balances green aromatic freshness with smoky resin and deep, luxurious oud.

Name: Meedansa
Description: With a rich blend of warm spices, floral elegance, woody depth, and creamy sweetness a bold scent that evolves beautifully on the skin.

Name: Aventisa
Description: A bold fusion of juicy bergamot, blackcurrant and apple leads into a rich pineapple heart, all grounded by a smoky, woody base that lingers with power.

Name: Guid Us
Description: The fragrance opens with an intriguing blend of juicy pear, creamy hazelnut, and resinous olibanum. At its heart, a rich bouquet of osmanthus, rose, saffron, and jasmine sambac unfolds, adding depth and refined elegance. The base settles into a warm and sensual fusion of sandalwood, smooth vanilla, akigalawood, ambergris, and labdanum, leaving a lasting and sophisticated trail.

Name: Tent By Lorensa
Description: It opens with a soft and elegant blend of powdery accords, rose, ylang-ylang, and jasmine. The heart continues the floral richness with rose and jasmine intertwined with tonka bean and delicate floral nuances. In the base, heliotrope and musk add warmth and depth, while rose and jasmine leave a smooth, lingering trail.

Name: The Onesa
Description: Scent is a true “fragrance with character” distinctive , captivating, and undeniably alluring. Its oriental floral-fruity composition radiates warmth and sensuality, enriched by a soft, powdery touch of vanilla. Even its color beautifully reflects the depth and mood of the scent. The fragrance opens with a delicate burst of freshness, where juicy mandarin and bright bergamot blend seamlessly with sweet litchi and velvety peach, creating an inviting and luminous introduction.

Name: Pure Poisonsa
Description: The scent opens with luminous notes of bergamot and jasmine, offering a fresh and inviting introduction. As it develops, a heart of sensual white florals unfolds rich, intoxicating, and irresistibly elegant. In the base, smooth sandalwood and warm amber provide depth and lasting warmth, leaving a memorable and enchanting trail.

Name: Falkyrsa
Description: The heart unfolds with a refined mix of lavender, sage, juniper berries, and geranium, adding aromatic complexity and a subtle herbal character. The dry-down reveals a rich foundation of tonka bean, cedar, amberwood, and vetiver, imparting warmth, depth, and a smooth woody finish that lasts.

Name: Omber Leather 2019
Description: The fragrance opens with a warm and aromatic touch of cardamom. At its heart, a rich blend of leather and jasmine sambac creates a balance between depth and floral elegance. The scent settles into a lasting base of amber, moss, and patchouli, adding warmth, earthiness, and refined sophistication.

Name: Majeed 2024
Description: Crafted to inspire, designed to ignite. Italian bergamot, pink pepper and apple create a fresh, vibrant opening, followed by a soft heart of lily of the valley and white amber. The scent settles into a rich base of berries, leather, vetiver and woody notes, leaving a warm and elegant trail.

Name: Vanilla Leather
Description: The heart reveals a luminous bouquet of tuberose, orange blossom, and jasmine, adding creamy floral richness and elegance. As it settles, the composition unfolds into a warm and sensual base of vanilla, leather, orris, benzoin, oak, and patchouli, creating depth, smoothness, and lasting sophistication.

Name: Majeed
Description: Crafted to inspire, designed to ignite.

Name: Misk Al Shioukhsa
Description: A curated blend of enchanting notes, opening with the timeless richness of rose and patchouli. Deep, refined, and universally adored, these accords create a harmonious contrast against the intensity of dark woody musk. Layer this luxurious fragrance over your favorite oud or perfume oil to craft a bold, personalized signature scent that is truly your own.

Name: Aoud Rose Woodsa
Description: The fragrance then settles into a deep and sensual finish built around precious agarwood (oud) and palisander rosewood, which give the dry-down a richly textured, woody signature that is both elegant and memorable.

Name: Ebene Fame
Description: Fragrance that radiates a transcendent aura of serenity and spiritual depth. Centered around warm woody accords, aromatic herbs, rich resins, and luxurious florals, the composition creates a harmonious and meditative experience. Sacred Palo Santo wood releases its purifying mystical essence, blending earthy and woody nuances with Delicate floral touches, complemented by hints of pine needles and smoky incense.

Name: Gozoosa
Description: The heart, warm cedarwood meets fresh violet leaves and aromatic geranium, creating a balanced and nuanced floral-woody signature. The journey culminates in a smooth and sensual base of patchouli, white musk, and ambroxan, leaving a long-lasting and unforgettable trail.

Name: Fabulusa
Description: The heart evolves into a luxurious blend of leather, bitter almond, vanilla, and orris rich and complex, yet feminine. Finally, the base settles into a warm and velvety trail of leather, tonka bean, cashmeran, white woods, and amber, making the scent long-lasting and unforgettable

Name: Habisa
Description: It opens with a fresh blend of green accords and bergamot lifted by cooling mint, leading into a heart of spicy black pepper, cinnamon, creamy coconut, ginger, and fig. The journey concludes with a rich base of sandalwood, tonka bean, vetiver, amber, and musk, offering depth, elegance, and lasting warmth.

Name: Garcon Manqsa
Description: This scent begins with intense incense that immediately draws you in. At its heart, osmanthus and smooth leather accords create a rich interplay of fruity softness and elegant depth. The dry-down reveals styrax and birch essences, adding a smoky, resinous warmth that lingers beautifully on the skin.

Name: Tajsa
Description: At its heart, luxurious musk and warm amber form the iconic signature that this fragrance is known for, creating an intimate yet captivating aura. The dry-down settles into a sophisticated woody base of patchouli and sandalwood, offering depth, longevity, and a refined finish.

Name: Terre De Sa
Description: The fragrance was crafted by perfumer Stephanie Bakouche. It opens with a vibrant blend of lavender, wormwood, and yuzu, creating a fresh yet slightly aromatic introduction. The heart unfolds with an intriguing mix of immortelle, oregano, iris, and fig, adding herbal warmth and subtle sweetness. The composition settles into a rich and earthy base of hay, vetiver, and labdanum, delivering depth, warmth, and long-lasting character.

Name: Narsikosa
Description: At its heart, luxurious musk and warm amber form the iconic signature that this fragrance is known for, creating an intimate yet captivating aura. The dry-down settles into a sophisticated woody base of patchouli and sandalwood, offering depth, longevity, and a refined finish.

Name: Nancy
Description: The juicy fruity opening invites the senses into a playful beginning, while the tender floral heart offers a feminine bouquet that is both timeless and enchanting. As the scent settles, a base of musk and gentle woody notes adds depth and longevity, leaving a refined and memorable trail.

Name: Vershisa Blue
Description: Powerful and energetic. Bright citrus meets deep woods for a bold masculine character.

Name: Florasa Georges Jasmin
Description: The heart unfolds into an opulent floral bouquet where noble jasmine, jasmine sambac, magnolia, and damask rose intertwine to evoke elegance and brightness. The dry-down is warm and comforting, with Australian sandalwood, benzoin, and patchouli providing a sensual, long-lasting finish.
Fresh and confident with a clean woody backbone. A versatile everyday signature scent.

Name: Poisonsa Red
Description: Intense, seductive, and sweet. A bold gourmand floral that leaves an unforgettable trail.

Name: Cinema
Description: Playful and charming with a sweet fruity sparkle balanced by soft florals and creamy vanilla.

Name: Shinalsa Cacu Madam
Description: Elegant and charismatic. A soft floral bouquet enriched with warm amber and vanilla for a luxurious feminine signature.

Name: Shinal Gabriellie
Description: A timeless white floral fragrance with a creamy woody finish. Refined, graceful, and perfect for everyday sophistication.

Name: Shinalsa Cacu
Description: Bright, elegant, and effortlessly feminine. A sparkling citrus opening blends into delicate florals, resting on a soft musky-vanilla base.

Name: Secandalsa
Description: It opens with uplifting citrus freshness before revealing a heart rich in honey and creamy gardenia, softened by succulent peach nectar. The dry-down settles into a warm, sensual blend of vanilla, caramel, patchouli, and tonka bean, creating a sultry and unforgettable trail.

Name: Daeorsa Parfum
Description: The heart unfolds with a balanced fusion of lavender, cardamom, and sage, giving the scent a smooth, aromatic character. Finally, the base wraps the composition in rich cedarwood, warm ambergris, vetiver, and sensual musk, creating a long-lasting and elegant dry-down.

Name: Good Girlsa
Description: It opens with rich almond and coffee notes that instantly draw attention, leading into a lush floral heart of tuberose and jasmine that feels both luxurious and empowering. The dry-down unveils a creamy, gourmand foundation featuring tonka bean, cocoa, vanilla, and sandalwood, leaving a sensual and memorable trail.

Name: Giv Black
Description: The dry-down is rich and seductive, featuring black vanilla, tonka bean, benzoin, and patchouli for a creamy, resinous finish.

Name: Lost Citysa
Description: The base notes of guaiac wood, patchouli, and vanilla provide a luxurious and memorable finish that lingers on the skin, making Lost City both distinctive and alluring. Ideal for those who appreciate modern woody gourmands with a refined character.

Name: Vershisa Eros
Description: It opens with a fresh burst of cool mint and zesty citrus, followed by a warm, aromatic heart that marries geranium with creamy tonka. The trail deepens into a rich blend of cedarwood, vetiver, and seductive vanilla, offering a powerful and magnetic scent that radiates confidence.

Name: Gishisa Guilty Elixir
Description: Bold and modern interpretation of masculine elegance. It opens with spicy yet refined citrus florals that evolve into a lush floral heart, before settling into a warm, sensual base of amber, patchouli, and vanilla. This composition offers remarkable longevity and projection, perfect for confident evening wear or special occasions.

Name: Stronger You
Description: Rich oriental-woody fragrance infused with refined fougère accents, capturing the thrill and emotion of new love. It opens with a vibrant blend of spices and soft violet, creating an immediate spark of intrigue. The heart unfolds into a warm, sensual fusion of lavender, sweet toffee caramel, and cinnamon, balancing freshness with indulgent sweetness.

Name: Tahsan
Description: A beautifully fresh and clean fragrance with a calming yet uplifting character. Soft jasmine notes bloom with natural elegance, evoking the warmth of humid summer evenings and the serenity of lush gardens glowing under golden sunlight. The scent lingers delicately in the air light, radiant, and effortlessly soothing.

Name: Morning Misksa
Description: Captures the purity of a quiet dawn — where light, air, and nature blend into perfect harmony. It opens with a crisp burst of luminous lime, instantly refreshing and uplifting, like the first breath of morning air.

Name: Hasiv X
Description: A modern reinterpretation of the iconic HASIV, celebrating brightness, depth, and vibrant elegance. Juicy pineapple bursts forth with a fresh-tart sweetness, joined by the vibrant sparkle of bergamot and the lively warmth of pink pepper — a bold and energizing opening that sets the tone for a bright, citrus-forward journey.

Name: Al Syabsa
Description: Elegant white floral fragrance that embodies femininity and sophistication. Created by renowned perfumer Francis Kurkdjian, it opens with the radiant scent of orange blossom, leading into a heart of jasmine and gardenia. The base notes of rose honey, patchouli, and cedarwood provide a warm and sensual finish. This fragrance is perfect for those seeking a luxurious and timeless scent.

Name: Lavestsa Bale
Short description: Inspired by La Vie Est Belle
Description: Radiant and sophisticated floral-gourmand fragrance that celebrates the beauty of life. With its blend of iris, praline, and patchouli, it offers a sweet and elegant scent profile. Ideal for those who appreciate a warm and inviting fragrance, La Vie Est Belle is perfect for both day and evening wear.

Name: Library
Description: Bold, floral fragrance that embodies freedom and femininity. It combines the aromatic freshness of lavender with the sensuality of Moroccan orange blossom, creating a unique and daring scent profile.

Name: Lady Millionairsa
Description: Glamorous fragrance made to stand out. It opens with a juicy blend of citrus and berry notes, moves into rich and creamy white florals, and dries down to a sweet, warm base with honeyed, amber and woody highlights. It feels luxurious, striking, and sweet with a confident edge.

Name: Coco Vanillasa
Description: Sweet, tropical gourmand scent that blends creamy coconut and vanilla with light fruity and floral elements. It feels like a warm, indulgent beach vacation in a bottle — rich, cozy, and wrapped in soft woods and musky undertones.

Name: Gishi Flora Gardenisa
Description: A joyful floral fragrance that opens with pear blossom, red berries, and Italian mandarin, blooms into a heart of gardenia, jasmine, and frangipani, and settles into a warm base of brown sugar and patchouli.

Name: Shansi
Description: Shinal Shans Tender is a bright, soft floral-fruity fragrance inspired by Chanel Chance Tender. It opens with fresh grapefruit (and hints of quince), flows into a delicate floral heart of jasmine and hyacinth, and finishes with a clean, powdery base of iris, Virginia cedar, and musk.

Name: Good Girl Velvet
Short description: Inspired by Good Girl Velvet Fatale
Description: This sensual floral-oriental composition harmonizes brightness with mystery. Fresh citrus and almond introduce the fragrance, leading into an opulent bouquet of tuberose and jasmine. The base unfolds with smooth tonka bean, cocoa, vanilla, and woody notes, creating a confident and seductive signature.

Name: Vershisa Crystal
Description: The heart blooms with soft petals of peony, lotus, and magnolia, exuding delicacy and femininity. As it settles, it reveals a warm, elegant base of musk, amber, and mahogany—balancing freshness with a gentle, enveloping softness.

Name: Man in Blacksa
Description: Parfum is a rich, ambery-woody fragrance that intensifies the original Eau de Parfum. Crafted by master perfumer Alberto Morillas, it opens with a vibrant spicy accord and elemi essence, then transitions into a luxurious heart of tuberose and iris. The scent settles into a deep base of dark woods and Siam benzoin, creating a bold and refined composition that embodies contemporary masculinity.

Name: Heegosa Scent Elixir
Short description: Inspired by The Scent Elixir Man
Description: A warm, spicy lavender fragrance that opens boldly with red pepper / pimento, softens into aromatic lavender, and finally settles into a woody base of sandalwood.

Name: Lunar
Description: Quiet nights beneath a moonlit southern sky. It’s presented as a dynamic citrus-woods fragrance—fresh, energising, and softly enveloping.

Name: Dakhoon 24
Description: This fragrance opens with fresh lavender, mandarin, orange, and bergamot. The heart blends cinnamon, nutmeg, pink pepper, and mint, while the base of musk, amber, oak, moss, vanilla, wood, and oud creates a warm, spicy, and luxurious trail.

Name: Gany Masa
Short description: Inspired by: Gany Masa Hair Mist
Description: Vibrant unisex fragrance that bursts open with juicy mango, saffron, lemon, and a hint of pink pepper. It evolves into a lush floral-spice heart and settles into a warm, woody-amber suede base for a rich, lasting trail.

Name: Solensia
Description: Gourmand sweetness with nutty pistachio and almond, softened by heliotrope and jasmine, then deepened with buttery caramel, creamy vanilla, and golden sandalwood — a cozy, irresistible summer scent.

Name: Tilisa
Description: Unisex oriental-gourmand fragrance that bursts with saffron and rich oud over a heart of rose and praline, settling into a warm, creamy base of oud and vanilla. Bold, opulent, and unforgettable.

Name: Leather Oud
Short description: Inspired by Leather Oud Hair Mist
Description: Unisex oriental-gourmand fragrance that bursts with saffron and rich oud over a heart of rose and praline, settling into a warm, creamy base of oud and vanilla. Bold, opulent, and unforgettable.

Name: Misk Ward
Short description: Inspired by Misk Ward Hair Mist
Description: Unisex fragrance built around musk and floral sensibilities. Expect a soft, clean aroma with warm undertones, ideal for daily wear and layering with other scents.

Name: Vusa
Description: Hair Perfume weaves a radiant yet soft aura: juicy white peach and citrus lift into luminous orange flower and vetiver, finally resting on a warm base of woods and musk for an elegant finish.

Name: N°6
Description: Nº 6 Hair Perfume is a unisex oriental-floral mist that opens with lush jasmine, exotic fruits and creamy coconut. It warms into rich sandalwood and spice, before settling into a soft, comforting base of amber, vanilla, and white musk — perfect for hair that lingers with elegance.

Name: Imperial Kwt
Description: Blends aromatic freshness with rich leather, oud, amber, and musk, wrapped in citrus and woody notes. A bold, timeless fragrance that evokes lasting memories.

24 opens with a comforting blend of sweet vanilla and gentle powdery accents that wrap you in soft warmth. At its heart, a refreshing interplay of passion fruit and fresh water brings a vibrant, invigorating spark. In the dry-down, the scent evolves into a musky and lavender-infused base—a sophisticated, subtly aromatic finish that lingers with effortless charm

Name: Way
Description: Way opens with a bright, effervescent burst of citrus, immediately uplifting the senses with its fresh, sparkling energy. Mid-scene, a creamy blend of white florals and tuberose blooms luxuriously—rich, elegant, and slightly narcotic in its floral intensity. Finally, the scent settles into a subtly sensual dry-down, grounded by animalic undertones and rounded off with comforting vanilla warmth, leaving a soft, lingering embrace.

Name: Miss Deeorsa
Description: Miss Deeorsa is a delicate, floral-scented perfume centered around fresh, classic blossoms—most notably Lily of the Valley. This charming feminine fragrance exudes light, airy elegance and timeless floral grace.

Name: Olympicsa
Description: Olympicsa opens with a luminous blend of water jasmine, green mandarin, and delicate ginger flower, creating a fresh and vibrant introduction. This brightness soon mellows into a heart of salted vanilla, offering a luxurious, gourmand twist that feels both modern and comforting.

Name: Black Opeumsa
Description: Black Orchaed opens with a spicy-earthy-floral spark, evolves into a luxurious chocolate-woody-amber heart, and settles into a cozy, sweet, and powdery base anchored by patchouli. Imperial KWT is a sophisticated fragrance that combines traditional Middle Eastern notes with modern elegance. Presented in a sleek white bottle with classic black labeling, this 80ml eau de parfum offers a complex blend of aromatic and woody notes.

Name: Black Orchisa
Description: Black Orchaed invites you into an elegant olfactory journey with its harmonious blend of warm, spicy, and earthy undertones. This unisex Arabic perfume unravels a rich, sensual story: sweet floral whispers mingle with the depth of amber and patchouli, while comforting hints of chocolate and balsamic notes round out its powdery finish, creating a refined and unforgettable fragrance.

Name: Magicsa
Description: It starts with a burst of salty sea air and ozone, softens into indulgent Turkish rose and praline, and settles into a warm, vanilla-amber-patchouli base. It feels luxurious, comforting, and rich in character.

Name: Kingsa
Description: A sophisticated blend that opens with sparkling citrus and juicy blackcurrant, leading to a heart of aromatic spice and deep woody notes. A scent that embodies confidence, elegance, and lasting character.

Name: Ghost Platinum
Description: It opens with crisp notes of lavender, rosemary, neroli, and petitgrain, flowing into an aromatic heart of geranium, clary sage, galbanum, and jasmine. The composition settles into a sophisticated base of oakmoss, vetiver, cedar, sandalwood, and amber, leaving a fresh yet elegant masculine trail.

Name: Shinalsa blue
Description: Refreshing and versatile fragrance that captures the essence of a coastal escape. It opens with invigorating citrus and herbal notes, leading into a clean, aquatic heart, and settles into a warm, earthy base. Suitable for both men and women, this scent is ideal for daytime wear, offering a sophisticated yet approachable profile.

Name: Stronger Leather
Short description: Inspired by Stronger With You Leather
Description: Bold and sensual fragrance that elevates the original Stronger With You with a rich, leathery twist. Crafted by perfumer Cecile Matton, it opens with warm chestnut and spicy elemi, leading into an aromatic heart of lavender and sage. The scent settles into a deep base of vanilla, leather, guaiac wood, and oud, creating a sophisticated and enduring profile. Presented in a sleek gold-toned bottle, this fragrance exudes confidence and elegance, making it ideal for evening wear and special occasions.

Name: Purposa
Description: The fragrance opens with a spicy fresh citrus and resinous frankincense impression. It evolves into a woody, smoky and resinous body, anchored by vetiver, papyrus and rose, and settles into a deep dry down with saffron, suede, and the synthetic Mystikal giving it an intense, earthy finish.

Name: Ganymadsa
Description: The scent opens with vivid saffron and Italian mandarin, followed by floral notes of osmanthus, violet leaf, and immortelle. It finishes with mineral facets, suede, akigalawood, musk, cedar, and patchouli. This perfume combines metallic cleanliness, oriental warmth, and leather-suede depth, making it unusual yet sophisticated.

Name: Iris
Description: Iris Hair Mist – A delicate floral hair mist blending bergamot and mandarin with a heart of jasmine, rose, and peach, resting on musk, sandalwood, and patchouli for soft, radiant hair.

Name: Fleur
Description: Give your hair a refreshing boost with our enchanting hair mist!Featuring notes of musk, iris, ambrette seed, and pink peppercorn, it delicately scents hair and skin. Enriched with camellia oil, it nourishes while misting a graceful, powdery-spicy aroma.

Name: Blossom
Description: Amouage is a sweet, powdery floral fragrance. It opens with heliotrope and bergamot, flows into a heart of amaretto, cherry blossom, ylang-ylang, and rose, and settles with a warm base of vanilla, tonka bean, suede, and amber.

Name: L’essense Royale
Description: Experience royal elegance with 3 luxurious 50ml perfumes

Name: The Regal Code
Description: Unlock elegance with 3 signature 50ml perfumes

Name: My Brabary
Description: My Burberry is a lush, floral-fruity perfume inspired by a London garden after rain. It opens with sweet pea, bergamot, mandarin orange, grapefruit, and lemon. The heart blends quince, freesia, geranium, peach, green notes, gardenia, and passionfruit. Base notes include damask rose, rose, patchouli, musk, leather, and violet. It’s elegant, fresh-floral, and ideal for day-wear with a touch of romantic charm.

Name: Epicsa
Description: Rich oriental-floral fragrance blending spicy and resinous layers for a luxurious profile. Top notes of caraway, cinnamon, and pink nerium oleander greet the senses. The heart reveals rose, jasmine, geranium, and tea. Deep base notes of oud, amber, vanilla, patchouli, sandalwood, orris root, olibanum, guaiac wood, and musk bring warmth, opulence, and lasting depth.

Name: One Millionairsa Lucky Homme
Description: One Million Lucky is a woody-gourmand fragrance for men that blends fruity, sweet, and rich accords. It opens with plum, ozonic notes, grapefruit, and bergamot, moves into a heart of hazelnut, honey, cedar, cashmere wood, orange blossom, and jasmine, and settles into a base of amberwood, patchouli, vetiver, and oakmoss. The scent is playful yet bold, making it great for evenings or casual outings.

Name: Narsikosa Powder
Description: Narsikosa Powder feminine fragrance that opens with Bulgarian rose, white jasmine, and orange blossom, leading to a heart of powdery musk. The base features cedar, vetiver, and patchouli, creating a warm, woody finish. Its elegant and soft composition is ideal for daily wear.

Name: One & One
Description: This fragrance opens with bright bergamot, passion fruit, and peach, leading to a floral heart of jasmine and geranium. A rich, gourmand base of caramel, patchouli, Madagascar amber, and white musk creates a warm, sensual, and sophisticated scent perfect for any occasion.

Name: Ahijezsa
Description: Ahijezsa fragrance opens with the golden sweetness of honey, wrapping the senses in warmth. At its heart, rich tobacco adds depth and sophistication. The scent finally settles into the earthy sweetness of fig, creating a balanced composition that feels both indulgent and timeless, perfect for evening elegance.

Name: Gishisa Absolou
Description: Gishisa Absolou It opens with grapefruit, bergamot, pineapple, and pink pepper, followed by spices like cinnamon and cardamom. The base of patchouli, vetiver, musk, and sandalwood creates a bold, smoky yet refined fragrance with strong projection and longevity.
